title: The Straw Hats Break CP9’s Wall: Rising Conflict
description: In the Enies Lobby Climax storyline, this section centers on CP9, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, Spandam, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as the scene develops across pages 5–8.
scene: This scene advances the Enies Lobby Climax conflict through CP9, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, Spandam, Unknown person #4, focusing on the immediate stakes of the straw hats break cp9’s wall: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: CP9
dialogue.text: that we can release Nico Robin...

dialogue.speaker: CP9
dialogue.text: This tower will soon be bombarded !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: has gone from bad to worse.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey!! Let me get on it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Impossible! The UMI- Ressha is full!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Send in the ships from Remote Islands!!

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: Bastard!! No wonder you were unusually calm!!

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: You tied yourself with your own rope!!

dialogue.speaker: CP9
dialogue.text: I was waiting for a good chance.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hurry and get outta the island !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: To the Judicial Island: Enies lobby.

dialogue.speaker: CP9
dialogue.text: I'll do whatever you cannot do.

dialogue.speaker: CP9
dialogue.text: And you do whatever I cannot do!!!

summary: This scene advances the Enies Lobby Climax conflict through CP9, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, Spandam, Unknown person #4, focusing on the immediate stakes of the straw hats break cp9’s wall: rising conflict.
